[30;1m940 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m941 | [0m[35m"use strict";[0m
[30;1m942 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m943 | [0m[35mvar at = __webpack_require__("02f4")(true);[0m
[30;1m944 | [0m[35m[0m
[30;1m945 | [0m[35m // `AdvanceStringIndex` abstract operation[0m
[30;1m946 | [0m[35m// https://tc39.github.io/ecma262/#sec-advancestringindex[0m
